ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID of the organism */,
  "assembly_id" TEXT /* Assembly ID of the organism */,
  "genome_size" INTEGER /* Genome size of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism the chromosome belongs to */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "centromere_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the centromere */,
  "centromere_end" INTEGER /* End position of the centromere */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromosomes_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being expressed */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Level of expression */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "new_gene_name" TEXT /* New name assigned to the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene annotation */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotation of the gene */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Disease associated with the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, annotator, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the history */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_history_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES gene_annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_data" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the visualization data */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being visualized */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for visualization (e.g., gene expression levels) */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, bar chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being referenced */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_references_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES gene_annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being varied */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of variation (e.g., SNV, deletion) */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the variation on the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variations_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)
